title: Fix remaining COBAD references to COBAT

requirements.text: Search and replace all remaining instances of 'COBAD 35' with 'COBAT 35' throughout the entire codebase, including HTML title tags, meta descriptions, component text content, form labels, success messages, and any other visible text. Ensure consistency across all frontend components and static content.
acceptanceCriteria: All visible text displays 'COBAT 35' instead of 'COBAD 35'
HTML title and meta tags use 'COBAT 35'
No instances of 'COBAD' remain in user-facing text
Spanish text maintains correct grammar and orthography with the new name

constraints: Do not modify immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Preserve existing burgundy and white color scheme
Maintain all existing functionality and component structure
nonGoals: Changing backend data models or stored data
Modifying the visual design or layout
Updating any functionality beyond text corrections
